evidence: TASK-028 verified. The pi-context-cli build now appends chmod +x dist/bin.js (commit a5055ad); after a clean npm run build, dist/bin.js is -rwxr-xr-x with the #!/usr/bin/env node shebang. Runtime demo: npm link from packages/pi-context-cli placed pi-context on PATH (/opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context); from /tmp (outside the repo) `pi-context read-block-item --cwd <repo> --block tasks --id TASK-028 --json` ran the op, resolving @davidorex/pi-context via the workspace symlink and reading the substrate; unlinked after. build + check + full test suite green (6 suites, fail 0). Fresh-context adversarial probe: PASS, no defects (one-line diff, exec bit reproducible, published path inherits via prepublishOnly, POSIX-chmod an accepted scope decision). Merged a5055ad fast-forward to context-jit-spec-v2.

criteria_results.criterion: CLI build sets the exec bit; dist/bin.js is -rwxr-xr-x after a clean build
npm link places an executable pi-context on PATH
pi-context <op> runs from a cwd outside the repo, resolving @davidorex/pi-context
criteria_results.evidence: ran read-block-item from /tmp with --cwd to the repo; returned TASK-028

criteria_results.criterion: build + check + full test suite pass at zero failures
